pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 11 to 17 to align with the migration target.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 11 language features and bytecode, failing to utilize or enforce Java 17 standards.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate the annotation API dependency from the legacy javax namespace to the Jakarta namespace.
pom.xml.why_exists: Java 17 and modern Jakarta EE environments do not include javax.annotation by default; using the old groupId/artifactId may lead to missing classes or conflicts with Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
